output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?movie ?movieLabel ?boxOffice WHERE {
  ?movie wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 ; rdfs:label ?movieLabel ; wdt:P244 ?boxOffice .
  FILTER(LANG(?movieLabel) = 'en' && CONTAINS(STR(?movieLabel) , 'Terminator'))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?boxOffice)
LIMIT 1

```sparql
SELECT ?movie ?movieLabel ?boxOffice WHERE {
  ?movie wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 ;

         wdt:P244 ?boxOffice .
  FILTER(LANG(?movieLabel) = 'en' && CONTAINS(STR(?movieLabel), 'Terminator'))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?boxOffice)
LIMIT 1
```
